22.07.2024: Update outstanding
20.01.2025: JAN Kalrl Warzelhan responsible: 
For the sub domains under boschsecurity.com we wrote an SLA document to continue with that sub-domain URL even after we are carved out. The idea is that Bosch (Robert Bosch Gmbh) (who owns the domain and will not sell or transfer the domain to us), will provide this services via NS delegation, so we are the in full control of the sub-domains. We requested 20 years since the URLs are embedded in devices where the FW cannot be updated or only by local visits. The 20 years were coming/requested by Gregor S. due to the lifespan of panels in the field.
So all API calls will at least remain for a certain time and for new products we should think of updating them to slowly migrate away. That plan is not yet established but once we know which names we can use we can slowly start to host Remote Portal under a new domain. In the backend still old URLs will continue.
